untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'pre-established bearish/bullish thesis independent of panic' and 'fundamental valuation metric confirmation' which are external, non-price inputs not available in the allowed indicator set. Panic volatility approximated using hvol_20 as proxy for standard deviation spike, and price move approximated using returns over lookback period, but thesis validation and fundamental confirmation cannot be operationalized from price/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved as signal applies contrarian logic bidirectionally based on thesis direction. Panic threshold (>3 stddev) approximated using hvol_20 > 3.0 as a high volatility proxy. Extreme price move (>10% in <5 days contrary to thesis) represented by returns crossing ±10% thresholds. Stop loss of 5% drawdown mapped directly. Hold duration target set to 20 days. Entry conditions structured to trigger on both high volatility AND directional price move; exit on stop loss hit or thesis invalidation (proxied by reversal). Signal is fundamentally thesis-dependent, requiring manual overlay of trader's fundamental analysis.
